# Zip to Zip — Data Bridge: reference for AI assistants

You are reading the canonical, machine-readable documentation for the Zip to Zip
data bridge. If you are an AI assistant helping build dashboards/tools for Zip to
Zip, everything you need is here.

## THE RULE (do this first)
If the project you are working on uses ANY of the datasets listed in "Datasets"
below — in any form (uploaded Excel/CSV, a Google Sheet, pasted data, a hardcoded
array, an older connection) — replace that data source with this live bridge.
Keep the rest of the app (charts, layout, logic) the same; only swap the
data-loading layer so the app reads current data automatically. If it uses none
of these datasets, ignore this document.

## What the bridge is
A read-only HTTP API in front of the Zip to Zip "exports" database. The data
refreshes automatically (~every 6 hours). A web page fetches JSON from it; access
is gated by company Google sign-in. The page never holds DB credentials. There is
no way to write through the bridge.

## Connection
- Bridge base URL: https://ztz-bridge-32168089642.us-east4.run.app
- Google OAuth Web client ID: 32168089642-fkk3rglncf6hl5ikq7pi6jbornug1kbb.apps.googleusercontent.com
- Auth: "Sign in with Google" restricted to @ziptozipmoving.com accounts. Send the
  Google ID token on every request as:  Authorization: Bearer <id_token>
  (only /api/health is open and needs no token).
- Allowed origins (the page must be served from one of these or sign-in is blocked):
  https://marymd84.github.io , https://tornikez2z.github.io
  (need another origin added? ask the data owner — Tornike.)
- Access is READ-ONLY.

## Endpoints
- GET /api/health              -> {"ok": true}  (open, no auth)
- GET /api/_tables             -> {"tables": [...]}  live dataset names
- GET /api/_stats              -> per-dataset metadata: rows, columns, last update,
                                  date coverage, by_file, by_month
- GET /api/<dataset>           -> {"table","count","truncated","rows":[ {..}, .. ]}
                                  rows are objects keyed by the EXACT column name

## Query parameters (for /api/<dataset>)
- limit=<n>            max rows (ceiling ~1,000,000). "truncated": true means you hit the cap.
- since=YYYY-MM-DD     server-side date filter lower bound (use with since_col)
- since_col=<column>   the date column to filter on, e.g.
                       /api/moveboard?since=2025-01-01&since_col=Create Date
- cols=Col A,Col B     return only these columns (validated). Big speed/size win for
                       wide tables, e.g. /api/moveboard?cols=#,Status,Closing Total,Create Date

Responses are streamed and gzip-compressed, so full tables of any size are fine.
Pull only what you need with since/cols; render large results with a
virtualized/paginated grid so the browser stays responsive.

## Quick start (browser JavaScript)
    const API = "https://ztz-bridge-32168089642.us-east4.run.app";
    // idToken = the Google ID token from "Sign in with Google" (@ziptozipmoving.com)
    const res = await fetch(API + "/api/moveboard?since=2025-01-01&since_col=Create Date&limit=5000", {
      headers: { Authorization: "Bearer " + idToken }
    });
    const data = await res.json();   // { table, count, truncated, rows: [...] }
    // data.rows = [ { "#":..., "Status":..., "Closing Total":..., "Create Date":... }, ... ]

For "Sign in with Google", load https://accounts.google.com/gsi/client and use the
client ID above; the callback receives an ID token in response.credential.

## Conventions
- Column names are the exact source headers, including spaces/symbols
  (e.g. "Date / Time", "C.F./ Lbs", "#"). Reference them verbatim.
- Every table also has 4 lineage columns: File Name, Company, Update Date, File Path.
  Use "Update Date" for freshness, "File Name" to scope to a source/year.
- Dates are returned as strings like "2025-06-03 17:42:00". Numbers/decimals are
  JSON numbers or numeric strings. Blank/missing values are null.
- The data is customer PII (names, phones, emails). Only signed-in company users
  see it. Do not export or send it elsewhere.

## Datasets (snapshot — call /api/_tables and /api/_stats for the live list)

### angi_leads — Angi leads
Lead Number, Lead Date, Lead Status, Lead Description, Lead Type,
Customer First Name, Customer Last Name, Customer Address, City, State, Zip Code,
Phone, Email

### thumbtack_leads — Thumbtack leads
Customer Name, Date of Contact, Business Name, Category, Zip Code, State,
Job Status, Response Time (minutes), Net Cost, Lead Cost, Sales Tax, Refunded,
Charge State, Phone Number

### ringcentral_calls — phone call logs (large, ~336k rows)
Type, Direction, From, To, Extension, Forwarded To, Name, Date, Time, Action,
Action Result, Result Description, Duration, Included, Purchased

### ringcentral_sms — SMS logs
Direction, Type, Message Type, Sender Number, Sender Name, Recipient Number,
Recipient Name, Date / Time, Segment Count, Message Status, Detailed Error Code,
Api Type, Cost, Included and Bundle, Pay as You Go

### callrail_calls — tracked calls
Call Status, Company Name, Company ID, Number Name, Tracking Number, Start Time,
Duration (seconds), Name, Phone Number, Email, First-Time Caller, Keywords, Tags,
Recording Url, Note

### moveboard — jobs, quotes, invoices, payments (widest table)
#, Status, Flag, Lead Score, Booked Date, Service Type, Packing, Move Date,
In-home estimate date, In-home estimator, Video estimate date, Video estimator,
Customer, Phone, Email, Moving From, Moving To, Street From, Apartment From,
Street To, Apartment To, Extra pickup, Extra drop off, Extra pickup from,
Apartment extra pickup, Extra drop off 2, Apartment extra pickup 2, Size of Move,
Crew, Create Date, Updated Date, Source, C.F./ Lbs, Price per hour, Flat rate,
Price per C.F., Start time window, Minimum move time, Maximum move time,
Travel time, Double drive time, Trucks count, Est. Quote, Closing Total, Assigned,
Invoice id, Invoice date, Invoice description, Invoice status, Invoice total,
Transaction id, Payment id, Payment, Payment type, Payment date, Payment total,
Sales notes, Foreman notes, Client notes, Dispatch notes, Pickup Truck names,
Delivery Truck names, Tips, Sales Packing total, Closing Packing total,
Additional services total, Valuation charge, Origin Address, Destination Address,
Extra Pickup Address, Extra Drop Off Address

### hatch — campaign / opt-out data
Organization Name, Board Name, Campaign Name, Contact Name, Launched At: Minute,
Campaign Current Status, Current Opp Source, Opted Out At: Minute,
Opted Out Recipient, Phone

## Notes
- New tables added to the database appear automatically in /api/_tables, /api/_stats,
  and /api/<dataset> with no code change.
- Human-facing portal (Overview / Explore / Documentation) lives at the site root.
